proposal1.heroHeadline: Tryaoc is losing 2,000 hours annually crafting proposals. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, Tryaoc spends hours manually preparing each proposal. With our system, generate a full proposal in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every issue below is a direct bleed from Tryaoc's resources.

problems.title: Time Sink
problems.description: Spending 5 hours per proposal means 2000 hours a year lost. That's time that could close deals or innovate new solutions.

problems.title: High Labor Cost
problems.description: At an average of $50/hour, Tryaoc is burning $100,000 annually on proposal writing. This is money not spent on growth.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual proposals vary in style. This inconsistency can erode brand trust, costing Tryaoc potential client confidence and loyalty.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.description: Manual processes delay proposal delivery by days. In fast-moving industries, this delay could mean losing a deal to a competitor.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Every hour spent writing proposals is an hour not spent prospecting new clients. This results in missed business opportunities.

problems.title: Error Prone
problems.description: Manual entries lead to errors, costing Tryaoc credibility and potentially losing contracts. Each mistake is a strike against reputation.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces every inefficient process with precision and speed.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals require hours of work. With this system, proposals are ready in 47 seconds.

solutions.title: Cost Effective
solutions.description: Today, labor costs for proposal writing are high. Our system slashes these costs dramatically.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Branding varies with manual work. Our system ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Tryaoc's brand standards.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: Currently, proposal progress is unclear. Our system offers real-time tracking, enhancing accountability and client trust.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual processes are error-prone. Our system automates entries, significantly reducing mistakes.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Tryaoc's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Tryaoc around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Tryaoc.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Business with AI Automation.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a comprehensive AI automation strategy that will increase efficiency and drive growth.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant losses due to inefficiencies.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is revenue walking out the door. This results in a 30% revenue loss monthly.

problems.title: Manual Process Bottlenecks
problems.description: Manual processes slow down operations, costing you an estimated 20 hours weekly and delaying project timelines.

problems.title: High Operational Costs
problems.description: Inefficient workflows lead to increased operational costs, draining about 15% of your monthly budget.

problems.title: Customer Churn
problems.description: Inconsistent customer experiences lead to a 10% increase in customer churn, impacting your bottom line.

problems.title: Data Inaccuracy
problems.description: Inaccurate data inputs result in faulty decision-making, costing you approximately $5,000 in losses annually.

problems.title: Limited Market Reach
problems.description: Without a scalable solution, expanding market reach is challenging, resulting in a 25% potential revenue loss.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions address these critical issues to optimize Acme Corp’s operations.

solutions.title: AI Automation Services
solutions.description: Automate repetitive tasks to increase efficiency and reduce errors. This solution will save time and cut costs.

solutions.title: Data Analysis & Insights
solutions.description: Improve decision-making with accurate data analysis. This will enhance strategic planning and reduce costly errors.

solutions.title: Digital Transformation
solutions.description: Upgrade your digital infrastructure to support growth. This will expand market reach and improve customer satisfaction.

solutions.title: Process Optimization
solutions.description: Streamline workflows to reduce operational costs and minimize bottlenecks. This ensures timely project delivery.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Tryaoc is the technical partner Acme Corp needs.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our team has a track record of successful AI implementations that drive business growth.

whyUsCards.title: Customized Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We tailor our services to meet your specific business needs, ensuring maximum impact.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Approach
whyUsCards.description: We rely on data to inform our strategies, ensuring measurable results.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Partnership
whyUsCards.description: We work closely with your team to ensure seamless integration and success.
